api-test-button.title: Test API Connection
api-test-button.error: API connection failed. Please check your credentials.
api-test-button.syncing: Connection successful! Syncing Freshdesk data now…
api-test-button.successWithSync: Connection successful & data synced! Agents: {agents}, Groups: {groups}, Products: {products}, Ticket fields: {ticketFields}, Email configs: {emailConfigs}, Companies: {companies}.
api-test-button.successSyncFailed: Connection OK but data sync failed: {error}. Data will refresh on the next scheduled run.
